sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_2b798f8867503200d358bb2d07415a5f
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_label/><action_name/><action_query>false</action_query><action_run_at/><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><application/><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>kb_knowledge</collection><condition>!(new KBCommon().isExternalArticle(current))</condition><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="kb_knowledge">workflow_stateVALCHANGES^EQ<item display_value="-- None --" endquery="false" field="workflow_state" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="VALCHANGES" or="false" value=""/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Create Activity</name><onclick/><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><read_access_action>false</read_access_action><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

	if(gs.getProperty('glide.knowman.enable_km_subscription', 'true') == 'true' && current.workflow_state == 'published' && previous.workflow_state != "published" && previous.workflow_state != "pending_retirement") {
		if(!current.article_id.nil()) {
			var knowledge_gr = new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
			knowledge_gr.addActiveQuery();
			knowledge_gr.setWorkflow(false);
			knowledge_gr.addQuery('sys_id','!=',current.sys_id);
			knowledge_gr.addQuery('article_id',current.article_id);
			knowledge_gr.orderByDesc('sys_created_on');
			knowledge_gr.query();
			gs.info('Create Activity called for KB: ' + current.sys_id); /*temporary log message - do no include in update set. */	
			if(knowledge_gr.next()){
				var subscription_gr = new GlideRecord('sn_actsub_subobject_stream');
				subscription_gr.addQuery('sub_obj_id',knowledge_gr.sys_id);
				subscription_gr.query();
				while(subscription_gr.next()) {
			        gs.info('In Create Activity called for KB: ' + current.sys_id + ' subscribeUser ' + subscription_gr.subscriber_id.document);  /*temporary log message - do no include in update set. */					
					new ActivitySubscriptionContext().getSubscriptionService().subscribeUser('7d8f537453003200fa9bd7b08cc5872c',current.sys_id,subscription_gr.subscriber_id.document);
				}
			}
		}
		gs.info('In Create Activity called for KB: ' + current.sys_id + ' subscribeUser ' + current.kb_knowledge_base.owner);  /*temporary log message - do no include in update set. */	
		new ActivitySubscriptionContext().getSubscriptionService().subscribeUser('7d8f537453003200fa9bd7b08cc5872c',current.sys_id,current.kb_knowledge_base.owner);
		if(current.revised_by)
			new ActivitySubscriptionContext().getActivityService().createActivity(current,"revised");
		else
			new ActivitySubscriptionContext().getActivityService().createActivity(current,"posted");
		
		gs.eventQueue("sn_actsub.create_activity",current,"skip","");
	}


})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2017-01-09 07:01:19</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_id>2b798f8867503200d358bb2d07415a5f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>54</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Create Activity</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Knowledge Management Advanced" source="com.snc.knowledge_advanced">81b0d40adb01f30042d27d0e0f96194d</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_2b798f8867503200d358bb2d07415a5f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>BN8JF0</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-21 20:56:51</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_e3fb375f6f2315005a807eeeae3ee410
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_label/><action_name/><action_query>true</action_query><action_run_at>server</action_run_at><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><application/><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>kb_knowledge</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>USPS_Group Separation in Knowledge Base</name><onclick/><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><read_access_action>false</read_access_action><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {
	// Check restrictions if user is not an admin or knowledge manager
	if (!gs.hasRole('admin') && !gs.hasRole('knowledge_manager') && gs.getSession().isInteractive()) {
		var userSysId = gs.getUserID();
		var groupSysIds = new global.ArrayUtil().convertArray(gs.getUser().getMyGroups());
		
		var queryCondition = [];
		queryCondition.push('author=' + userSysId); //Author
		queryCondition.push('u_groupISEMPTY'); //Restricted Group is empty
		queryCondition.push('u_groupIN' + groupSysIds.toString()); //Restricted group is one of my groups
		queryCondition.push('ownership_groupIN' + groupSysIds.toString()); //Ownership group is one of my groups
		current.addEncodedQuery(queryCondition.join('^OR'));
	}
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>david.i.stevenson</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2014-03-25 01:18:23</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_id>e3fb375f6f2315005a807eeeae3ee410</sys_id><sys_mod_count>37</sys_mod_count><sys_name>USPS_Group Separation in Knowledge Base</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package/><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_e3fb375f6f2315005a807eeeae3ee410</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>BN8JF0</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-06 20:14:33</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script></record_update>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>true</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description>Allow write for records in kb_knowledge, for users with role itil, and if the ACL script returns true.</description><local_or_existing>Local</local_or_existing><name>kb_knowledge</name><operation display_value="write">write</operation><script><![CDATA[if((current.author == gs.getUser() && current.workflow_state == 'draft')){
	answer = true;
}else{
	answer = false;
